creator: seki@sysrap.cs.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
I booted the floppy, and the initial screen of sysinstall
	was shown.

	Then, I hit ESC key to invoke sub-shell.

	The shell didn't start.  Instead, a dialog for reboot-
	confirmation was shown.  (A same dialog as that for CANCEL?)

Fix: 

Not sure.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Start sysinstall and hit ESC.
